movie.title: Oasis : Season 1 Dual/Multi Audio [Hindi ORG, Spanish & ENG] WEB-DL 720p HEVC | [Complete]
movie.synopsis: ‘Oasis’ is the country’s most luxurious vacation resort. A paradise for wealthy families with private beaches, VIP facilities, and impenetrable security. The place for the best summer ever. But everything crumbles when police storm in.
